message:
fix: code quality improvements and edge case handling

- doctor.rs: Improve code formatting for glob pattern escaping logic,
  breaking long lines for better readability in check_required_files
  and validate_archive functions

- parser.rs: Remove trailing whitespace in glob pattern handling code

- repl.rs: Add guard to skip displaying date for results with invalid
  timestamps (epoch 0), preventing confusing "Jan 1, 1970" output

- stats_analytics.rs: Replace manual range comparison with idiomatic
  Rust range contains() method for hour validation (clippy suggestion)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
